landing.heroSub: Control all your motors and shades with a single smart hub.
landing.feature1Desc: Control your motors and shades from anywhere in the world.
landing.feature2Desc: 433.42 MHz RTS protocol compatible with all Somfy motors.
landing.feature3Desc: Automatic control with daily and weekly timers.

firmware.title: Firmware Download
firmware.v100changes: Initial release: WiFi management, motor control, RTS protocol, scheduling, MQTT, Luxa Cloud integration.
firmware.flashStep1: Install PlatformIO (VS Code extension or CLI)
firmware.flashStep4: Run in terminal: pio run -t upload
firmware.otaNote: OTA (wireless) updates are also supported after WiFi connection.

setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.step1Desc: Connect the CC1101 RF module to ESP32-S3 via SPI. Connect motor relays to GPIO 4 (Up) and GPIO 5 (Down).
setup.step2Desc: Upload firmware to ESP32. On first boot, the device creates a 'Luxa-XXXXXX' WiFi network.
setup.step3Desc: Connect to 'Luxa-XXXXXX' from your phone (password: luxa1234). Select your home WiFi on the setup page.
setup.step4Desc: After WiFi connection, access the control panel at http://luxa.local in your browser.
setup.step5Desc: Go to Luxa Cloud section in the control panel. Scan the QR code or enter the device code at cloud.luxasystem.com.
setup.step6Desc: Create a virtual remote in the RF section. Put your Somfy motor in programming mode and press PROG.
setup.pinCC1101: CC1101 SPI: SCK=10, MOSI=11, MISO=12, CS=9, GDO0=14

device.title: Device Details
device.name: Device Name
device.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this device?

addDevice.title: Add New Device
addDevice.step1: Make sure your Luxa Core is powered on and connected to WiFi.
addDevice.step2: Go to the Luxa Cloud section in the device's web interface.
addDevice.step3: Scan the QR code on screen or enter the device code.
addDevice.claimFailed: Could not add device. Check the code.
addDevice.alreadyClaimed: This device is already linked to another account.
